Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Ike Okwuosa.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Denise Duewiger is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of DEC-5-2011 remains on calendar.
